response.justification: Over 15 years of progressive full-stack engineering experience with a strong match to the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes all appear across multiple recent roles. Current position at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which maps precisely to the role's AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated ability to work at scale (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby), practice TDD rigorously, and contribute to developer tooling makes this candidate well-suited for an internal automation tooling context.
strengths: Direct, current AI-agent and MCP framework experience at re:cinq aligns with a differentiating requirement most candidates will lack
Full-stack depth across TypeScript/Node.js/React with cloud and containerization (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) matching the core stack
Strong testing culture: built testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), conducted TDD workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD in production roles
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume, which is a central backend framework in the role's primary stack
Vitest is absent from the listed skills and project history, though general testing competency appears solid
Kotlin is listed as a secondary requirement and only Java appears (briefly, in an embedded/robotics context), with no JVM backend service experience evident

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
TypeScript/Node.js/React stack alignment with cloud and container tooling
Nest.js and Vitest gaps in stated experience
